case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. ALISTAR INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALISTAR INSURANCE COMPANY $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $104.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,604.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
